message:
fix: 2 correctness bugs — WasmAgg empty sum/avg null, string MIN/MAX support; merge wasmFilterRange/NotRange (-55 lines)

Correctness:
- WasmAggregateOperator: sum/avg return null (not 0) for empty groups (SQL standard)
- partial-agg: MIN/MAX on string columns now works (was silently returning null)
  - Added strMin/strMax fields to PartialAggState with merge support

Code reduction:
- Merged wasmFilterRange and wasmFilterNotRange into single function with negate flag (-50 lines)
- DRY canSkipFragment: extracted synthPage helper and filterSkips closure (-12 lines)
